title: Milk in Cauldron
description: This simple mod adds the ability to pour milk from a bucket into a cauldron
body:
# 🥛 Milk in Cauldron

Ever wanted to store your milk in a cauldron? Now you can!

## What does this mod do?

This simple mod adds the ability to **pour milk from a bucket into a cauldron** - just like you can with water, lava, or powder snow!

## ✨ Features

🪣 **Fill cauldrons with milk** - Right-click an empty cauldron with a milk bucket

🥛 **Retrieve your milk** - Right-click a full milk cauldron with an empty bucket  

🎨 **Clean visuals** - The milk is displayed as a white liquid inside the cauldron

🔊 **Authentic sounds** - Uses vanilla bucket sounds for immersion

## 📖 Usage

| Action | Result |
|--------|--------|
| Milk Bucket + Empty Cauldron | Milk Cauldron + Empty Bucket |
| Empty Bucket + Full Milk Cauldron | Empty Cauldron + Milk Bucket |

## 💡 Use Cases

- **Decoration** - Add milk cauldrons to your kitchen builds
- **Storage** - Keep your milk safe in cauldrons
- **Farms** - Store milk from your cow farms

## 📋 Requirements

- Minecraft **1.21.10**
- Fabric Loader **0.18.2+**
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) **0.138.3+1.21.10**

## 🔗 Links

- [GitHub](https://github.com/whitoutcookies/milk-in-cauldron)
- [Report Issues](https://github.com/whitoutcookies/milk-in-cauldron/issues)

---

*A simple quality-of-life mod that makes Minecraft just a little bit better!*
